name: effective_date
label: Effective Date
hint: Select agreement effective date

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city and state where agreement is executed

name: indemnity_context
label: Indemnity Context
hint: Select the scenario for this indemnity

name: indemnifier_name
label: Indemnifier Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: indemnifier_address
label: Indemnifier Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: indemnifier_type
label: Indemnifier Type
hint: Select type of indemnifier

name: indemnifier_authorized_signatory_name
label: Indemnifier Authorized Signatory Name
hint: Enter name of the person signing for the entity

name: indemnifier_authorized_signatory_designation
label: Indemnifier Authorized Signatory Designation
hint: Enter designation, e.g. Director, CEO, Partner

name: indemnifier_registration_number
label: Indemnifier Registration Number
hint: Enter CIN, LLPIN, registration number, or similar identifier

name: indemnified_party_name
label: Indemnified Party Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: indemnified_party_address
label: Indemnified Party Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: indemnified_party_type
label: Indemnified Party Type
hint: Select type of indemnified party

name: agreement_title
label: Agreement Title
hint: e.g., Indemnity Agreement for Services

name: background_context
label: Background / Purpose
hint: Describe context of indemnity (contract, service, event, etc.)

name: condition_of_premises
label: Condition of Premises
hint: Describe the condition, handover status, defects, or property-specific background facts

name: warranty_of_ownership
label: Warranty of Ownership
hint: Confirm ownership or valid rights over the IP, software, creative work, or materials being indemnified

name: indemnity_scope
label: Indemnity Scope
hint: Clearly define covered losses, damages, liabilities

name: covered_losses
label: Covered Losses
hint: Specify types (legal costs, damages, third-party claims)

name: exclusions
label: Exclusions
hint: Mention what is NOT covered (negligence, fraud, etc.)

name: liability_cap_toggle
label: Liability Cap Applies
hint: Tick if the indemnity has a financial cap; leave unchecked for unlimited indemnity

name: liability_cap
label: Liability Cap Amount
hint: Enter maximum indemnity amount

name: currency
label: Currency
hint: Select currency for the liability cap

name: claim_procedure
label: Claim Procedure
hint: Steps for making indemnity claims

name: notice_period
label: Notice Period for Claims
hint: e.g., within 30 days of claim

name: defense_control
label: Control of Defense
hint: Who controls legal defense of claims

name: settlement_terms
label: Settlement Terms
hint: Conditions for settlement of claims

name: subrogation_rights
label: Subrogation Rights
hint: Specify whether and how recovery rights against third parties transfer after payment

name: duration
label: Duration
hint: Enter duration (fixed term or ongoing)

name: survival_clause
label: Survival Clause
hint: Specify how long indemnity obligations continue after termination or expiry

name: termination_clause
label: Termination Clause
hint: Conditions for termination

name: insurance_required
label: Insurance Required
hint: Tick if insurance must be maintained to support the indemnity

name: insurance_requirement
label: Insurance Details
hint: Specify policy types, limits, insurer requirements, or certificate obligations

name: confidentiality_clause
label: Confidentiality Clause
hint: Confidentiality obligations

name: include_non_solicitation
label: Include Non-Solicitation
hint: Tick if this indemnity is paired with non-solicitation restrictions

name: non_solicitation_details
label: Non-Solicitation Details
hint: Describe restrictions on soliciting employees, contractors, vendors, or clients

name: indemnity_type
label: Type of Indemnity
hint: Select indemnity type

name: tax_gross_up
label: Tax Gross-up
hint: Tick if the indemnifier must pay additional amounts so the indemnified party receives the full amount net of taxes

name: dispute_resolution_method
label: Dispute Resolution Method
hint: Select how disputes should be resolved

name: governing_law
label: Governing Law
hint: Enter applicable law (e.g., Laws of India)

name: jurisdiction
label: Jurisdiction
hint: Enter court jurisdiction
